user.title: Tado X Proxy Thermostat
user.description: Select the source climate entity, an external temperature sensor, and a name for the proxy thermostat.

error.temp_not_a_sensor: Please select a sensor entity as the external temperature sensor.
error.temp_not_temperature: Please select a temperature sensor (device_class: temperature).

data_description.boost_duration: How long boost mode stays active before returning to the previous preset.

data_description.window_sensor_id: Binary sensor that detects an open window. When triggered, heating is paused.
data_description.window_delay_s: Delay before heating is paused after the window opens.
data_description.window_close_delay_s: Delay before heating resumes after the window closes.

data_description.presence_sensor_id: Binary sensor for presence detection. Switches to away mode when no presence is detected.
data_description.presence_away_delay_s: Delay before switching to away mode after presence is lost.
data_description.presence_home_delay_s: Delay before switching back to comfort mode after presence is detected.

data_description.correction_kp: Proportional gain of the PI controller. Higher values react faster to temperature deviations.
data_description.correction_ki: Integral gain of the PI controller. Higher values correct persistent offsets more aggressively.
data_description.overlay_refresh_s: Periodically resend the setpoint to the TRV to keep cloud-API overlays alive. 0 = off.
data_description.gain_scheduling_enabled: Faster heating on cold start, gentler near target.

error.temp_not_temperature: Please select a temperature sensor (device_class: temperature).
